# Peptides and You

> Premium pharmaceutical-grade peptides. Lab tested with Certificate of Analysis included.

## About

Peptides and You is a trusted supplier of pharmaceutical-grade peptides in the Philippines and Southeast Asia. All products are lyophilised powder vials, third-party lab tested, and supplied with Certificate of Analysis (COA) to verify identity and purity.

## Products

We carry 12 products across 8 categories:

- BPC-157 (Healing & Recovery) — From ₱1,800
- TB-500 (Healing & Recovery) — From ₱1,500
- GHK-Cu (Anti-Aging & Skin) — From ₱2,000
- Retatrutide (Weight Management) — From ₱3,500
- Wolverine Stack (Recovery Stack) — From ₱3,000
- Epithalon (Longevity & Anti-Aging) — ₱1,850
- AOD-9604 (Fat Loss & Metabolic) — ₱2,000
- Semax (Cognitive & Neuro) — ₱1,750
- Selank (Cognitive & Mood) — ₱1,600
- CJC-1295 (Growth Hormone) — From ₱1,800
- Ipamorelin (Growth Hormone) — From ₱1,600
- HGH rHGH (Hormonal & Performance) — From ₱1,470

## Key Features

- All products are lab tested with Certificate of Analysis
- Pharmaceutical-grade lyophilised powder vials
- Secure and discreet shipping
- Philippines and international delivery
- Trusted by practitioners across Southeast Asia
